login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.subtitleInviteHint: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to get started
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.checkEmailHint: We sent a confirmation link to your email address.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successHint: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox.

activityFeed.title: Recent Activity
activityFeed.noActivityHint: Activity from messages, deals, broadcasts, and automations will appear here.

conversationsChart.title: Conversations Over Time
conversationsChart.subtitle: Daily message volume by direction
conversationsChart.noData: No message activity in this range
conversationsChart.noDataHint: Send or receive messages to start populating this chart.

responseTimeChart.title: Average First Response Time
responseTimeChart.subtitle: Minutes to reply to a customer's first unreplied message, by weekday
responseTimeChart.noDataHint: This chart fills in as you reply to customer messages.

pipelineDonut.title: Pipeline Value
pipelineDonut.subtitle: Open deals by stage
pipelineDonut.noDataHint: Create deals in Pipelines to see stage breakdowns here.

page.title: Dashboard
page.subtitle: Live analytics across conversations, contacts, deals, broadcasts, and automations.

inbox.typeMessage: Type a message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
inbox.sendTemplate: Send a template to start the conversation
inbox.selectConversationHint: Choose a conversation from the left to start messaging
inbox.sessionExpired: 24-hour session expired. Use a template to re-engage.
inbox.readOnlyPlaceholder: Read-only - viewers can browse but not reply
inbox.readOnlyTitle: Read-only - your role can't send messages
inbox.templateDialogPickDesc: Pick an approved WhatsApp template to send to this contact.
inbox.templateDialogFillDesc: Fill in the placeholders to render this template. Meta requires every variable to be set.
inbox.noApprovedTemplatesHint: Approve a template in Meta WhatsApp Manager, then sync it from Settings -> Templates.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.name: Name
contacts.phoneHint: Include country code, e.g. +1 for US
contacts.addContactDesc: Fill in the details to create a new contact.
contacts.noTagsAvailable: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.
contacts.noCustomFields: No custom fields defined. Create them in Settings.
contacts.clickTagHint: Click a tag to add or remove it from this contact.
contacts.noTagsForContact: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.
contacts.importDesc: Upload a CSV file with a "phone" column (required). Optional columns: name, email, company.
contacts.csvNoValidRows: No valid rows found. Ensure CSV has a "phone" column header.
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
contacts.deleteContactDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

analytics.totalDealsTooltip: Count of every deal in this pipeline that isn't marked as Lost. Won deals are still included.
analytics.pipelineValueTooltip: Sum of the dollar values of all deals in this pipeline, excluding deals marked as Lost.
analytics.avgDealSizeTooltip: Pipeline Value divided by Total Deals - the average value of a single non-lost deal.
analytics.weightedValueTooltip: Expected revenue: each open deal's value x its stage probability. First stage ~ 10%, stages progress up to 90%, Won = 100%. Lost deals are excluded.
analytics.wonThisMonthTooltip: Deals marked as Won since the first day of the current month.
analytics.lostThisMonthTooltip: Deals marked as Lost since the first day of the current month.

settings.deletePipelineDesc: This will archive all deals in this pipeline. This cannot be undone.
settings.moveDealsFirst: Move or delete deals in this stage first

toast.requiredFields: Title, contact, and stage are required

steps.chooseTemplateSubtitle: Select an approved message template for your broadcast.
steps.selectAudienceSubtitle: Choose who will receive this broadcast.
steps.personalizeSubtitle: Map template variables to contact fields, custom fields, or static values.
steps.scheduleSendSubtitle: Name your broadcast, review the details, and send.

template.createFirst: Create a template in Settings first.

audience.allContactsDesc: Send to every contact in your database
audience.customFieldDesc: Filter by a custom field value
audience.uploadCsvDesc: Upload a list of phone numbers
audience.noTagsFound: No tags found. Create tags in Settings.
audience.noCustomFields: No custom fields defined. Create one in Settings -> Custom Fields.
audience.selectToEstimate: Select an audience type to see the estimate.

personalize.noVariables: This template has no variables to personalize.
personalize.unmappedWarning: Map every placeholder before continuing - still missing
personalize.unmappedEmpty: Otherwise those placeholders will ship to Meta as empty strings.

schedule.confirmDesc: You are about to send this broadcast to
schedule.confirmDescTemplate: template. This action cannot be undone.

triggers.firstInboundHint: First time this contact ever messages you (works for manually-added contacts too)
triggers.newContactHint: When a contact is auto-created from an incoming message
triggers.tagAddedHint: When a tag is added to a contact

builder.closeConversationDesc: Sets the conversation status to "closed". No configuration needed.

header.description: Optional description (internal - customers don't see this)
header.unsavedChanges: Unsaved changes - hit Save to persist
header.fixIssues: Fix the issues below before activating

builder.addFirst: Add your first node to get started

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, WhatsApp® integration, message templates, and tags.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.
profile.photoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
profile.emailChangePending: Check the inbox for {email1} and {email2} - both need to confirm before the change takes effect.
profile.profileSavedEmailChange: Profile saved - check your email to confirm the address change
profile.unsupportedImageDesc: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.

password.title: Password
password.description: Use at least {min} characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters
password.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
password.noEmail: Cannot change password without a current email

appearance.title: Color theme
appearance.description: Pick the accent color used across the app. All themes stay dark - only the primary color (buttons, active nav, badges) changes. Saved to this device.

members.title: Account members
members.description: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
members.pendingHint: The plaintext invite URL is only shown once at creation for security - to re-share, revoke the invite below and create a new one.
members.noPendingHint: Click Invite member above to generate a shareable link.

removeDialog.title: Remove member
removeDialog.description: Remove {name} from the account? They'll be signed out of this account and given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't deleted.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Generate a one-time invite link. Share it via WhatsApp, Slack, or any channel you like - no email service required.
invite.roleDescriptionAdmin: Can invite teammates, manage settings, send messages, and edit data.
invite.roleDescriptionAgent: Can use the inbox, contacts, broadcasts, automations, and flows. No settings or member access.
invite.roleDescriptionViewer: Read-only access across every page. Cannot send or edit anything.
invite.label: Label
invite.labelHint: Helps you remember who you sent the link to in the pending list below.
invite.createdDescription: Share this link with your new teammate. They'll be able to sign up (or sign in) and join the account as {role}. The link is valid for {days} days.
invite.createdDescriptionOne: Share this link with your new teammate. They'll be able to sign up (or sign in) and join the account as {role}. The link is valid for 1 day.
invite.clipboardBlocked: Clipboard blocked - copy the link manually
invite.warningText: We never store the plaintext - once you close this dialog the URL is gone. To re-share, revoke this invite and create a new one.
invite.whatsAppMessage: Join {accountName} on wacrm using this link (valid for {days} days): {url}

templates.title: Templates
templates.managerDesc: Create message templates and submit them to Meta for approval. Use "Sync from Meta" to pull templates approved elsewhere.
templates.syncTitle: Pull approved templates from your Meta WhatsApp Business Account
templates.noTemplatesHint: Create your first message template to get started.
templates.editWarning: Editing triggers Meta re-review - status flips to PENDING.
templates.resubmitTitle: Edit the template and resubmit to Meta for review.
templates.deleteMetaLabel: Delete template from Meta and locally
templates.editDialogDesc: Save your changes to re-submit to Meta. Status will flip back to PENDING during review.
templates.newDialogDesc: Build a template and submit it to Meta for approval. Once approved, you can use it in broadcasts and the inbox.
templates.authBanner: AUTHENTICATION templates have a fixed body + OTP button shape that needs a different builder. Create them in Meta WhatsApp Manager for now and use <sync>Sync from Meta</sync> to bring them in.
templates.nameFixedHint: Name is fixed once a template exists on Meta - create a new template to change it.
templates.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
templates.languageFixedHint: Language is fixed once a template exists on Meta.
templates.languageHint: Must match the exact code on Meta - {en_US} and {en} are distinct.
templates.headerTextSamplePlaceholder: Sample value for {{1}} (required for Meta review)
templates.headerMediaHint: Must be publicly accessible HTTPS. Meta fetches it once during review, so the file needs to stay live for ~24 hrs.{imageHint}{videoHint}{documentHint} Direct file upload is coming in a follow-up.
templates.mediaHintImage: Recommended: JPEG or PNG, >=800x418 px, <=5 MB.
templates.bodyHint: Use {{1}}, {{2}} for variables (must be contiguous starting at {{1}}).
templates.bodySamplesLabel: Sample values (Meta uses these to review your template)
templates.buttonsHint: Up to {max} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come before URL / phone / copy-code buttons.
templates.btnUrlSamplePlaceholder: Example value for {{1}} (required when URL has a variable)
templates.deleteDialogMetaDesc: "{name}" will be deleted from Meta and from wacrm. Active broadcasts using this template will start failing on their next send. This can't be undone.
templates.deleteDialogLocalDesc: "{name}" will be deleted from wacrm. It was never submitted to Meta, so no remote cleanup is needed.

toasts.editSubmitted: Edit submitted - Meta typically reviews within 24 hours.
toasts.submitted: Submitted to Meta - typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.
toasts.synced: Synced {total} template{total, plural, =1 {} other {s}} from Meta
toasts.syncedDetails: Synced {total} template{total, plural, =1 {} other {s}} from Meta ({inserted} new, {updated} updated)
toasts.syncTruncated: Synced the first 2000 templates only - your account has more. Sync again to continue, or contact support if this persists.

whatsapp.credentialsValidDesc: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.
whatsapp.registeredTitle: Registered - Meta will deliver events to wacrm
whatsapp.notRegisteredTitle: Not registered - Meta will not deliver events
whatsapp.registeredDesc: Subscribed since {date}. Click <verify>Verify with Meta</verify> if events stop arriving.
whatsapp.registrationFailedDesc: Last attempt failed with: <errorSpan>"{error}"</errorSpan>. Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
whatsapp.registrationSkippedDesc: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.
whatsapp.credentialsCardDesc: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsapp.tokenHiddenHint: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
whatsapp.verifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
whatsapp.pinHint: Required the first time you connect a number, and any time you swap to a different number. Set it in Meta Business Manager -> WhatsApp Accounts -> Phone Numbers -> Two-step verification. Without this PIN, Meta saves your credentials but won't route inbound messages to wacrm - the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA. Leave blank to keep an existing registration untouched.
whatsapp.webhookCardDesc: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.
whatsapp.instructionsDesc: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
whatsapp.step1Desc:
Go to <primary>developers.facebook.com</primary>
Click "My Apps" and then "Create App"
Select "Business" as the app type
Fill in app details and create
whatsapp.step2Desc:
In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
Find "WhatsApp" and click "Set Up"
Follow the setup wizard to link your business
whatsapp.step3Desc: Go to WhatsApp > API Setup Copy your Phone Number ID Copy your WhatsApp Business Account ID Generate a Permanent Access Token from Business Settings > System Users
whatsapp.step4Desc: Go to WhatsApp > Configuration Click "Edit" on the Webhook section Paste the Webhook Callback URL from above Enter the same Verify Token you set here Subscribe to "messages" webhook field

toasts.tokenRequired: Access Token is required for initial setup
toasts.reenterToken: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
toasts.saveRegError: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number: {error}
toasts.saveSuccess: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
toasts.testNetworkError: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
toasts.verifySuccess: Number is fully wired - Meta is delivering events.
toasts.verifyFailed: Number is not fully registered. See the checks below for which step failed.
toasts.verifyEndpointError: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
toasts.confirmReset: This will delete the current WhatsApp config so you can re-enter it. Continue?
toasts.resetSuccess: Configuration cleared. You can now re-enter your credentials.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Sign out of every device where you're logged in - including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
sessions.confirmDescription: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Organize your contacts with color-coded tags.
tags.noTagsHint: Create tags to categorize your contacts.
tags.newTagDescription: Create a new tag with a name and color.
tags.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{name}"? This will remove it from all contacts. This action cannot be undone.

account.title: Account settings
account.description: Configure account-wide defaults shared by all members.
account.currencyHint: All new deals default to this currency. Individual deals can still override it.

join.notFoundBody: This link doesn't match a valid invitation. Double-check the URL or ask the person who invited you to send a new one.
join.usedBody: This invitation has already been accepted. If that wasn't you, ask the account admin to send a fresh link.
join.expiredBody: This invitation has expired. Ask the account admin to send a new one - they take a few seconds to generate.
join.serverErrorBody: We couldn't verify this invitation right now. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
join.acceptingNote: Accepting moves your login into {account}. Your empty personal account from signup will be cleaned up.
join.cantJoinDesc: To join {account}, sign out and sign up again with a different email address. The invite link stays valid as long as it hasn't expired.
join.signOutRetry: Sign out & use a different email
join.cantSignOut: Could not sign out. Try refreshing the page.

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to do this.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

startConversation.newContact: A new contact will be created
startConversation.whatsappNotConfigured: WhatsApp not configured. Set up the integration in Settings.
startConversation.windowExpired: 24h window has expired. Select a template to reopen the conversation.
startConversation.errorMetaApi: Error sending via Meta API. Please try again.
startConversation.errorSave: Message sent but failed to save. Contact support.
startConversation.contactNoPhone: This contact has no valid phone number
